name: Insert & highlight code
description: Inserts content into a file and highlights the inserted lines.
author: estruyf

fields.name: MAIN_FILE
fields.description: Relative path to the file to insert content into

fields.name: CONTENT_PATH
fields.description: Relative path to the content file

fields.name: CONTENT_POSITION
fields.description: Line number where the content should be inserted

fields.name: HIGHLIGHT_POSITION
fields.description: Line number to highlight after insertion
